lesson_title: Problems, Advice and Decisions: Reading Lesson 3
learning_objective: Learners can explain, narrate, give reasons and manage familiar situations in a reading task about environment.
cefr_outcome: Learners can deal with most situations while travelling and produce simple connected text on familiar topics.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise reading for problems, advice and decisions. You will learn useful language connected to environment and practise modals of advice. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at B1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: modals of advice. Vocabulary theme: environment. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At B1, learners should explain, narrate, give reasons and manage familiar situations with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use modals of advice to talk about environment.
Example 2: The learner gives a B1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for B1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using modals of advice.
options: Correct use of modals of advice in a B1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with modals of advice.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses modals of advice accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of modals of advice.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the environment phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand environment.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand environment.

distractors: Wrong tense for modals of advice

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form modals of advice. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about environment using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: B1 Reading Check - Problems, Advice and Decisions
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short reading task using modals of advice and vocabulary from environment.
success_criteria: Uses modals of advice with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses modals of advice and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to environment.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about environment. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short B1 response about environment. Include the target language: modals of advice.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for B1-M04-L03. Speaker one: Today we are practising environment. Speaker two: I need to use modals of advice correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Modals Of Advice form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for modals of advice
